verified.exampleDetail: 敵圧920 / 守備1 / 予備1 / 群集 接近

mobileQa.reason: mobile is no longer a current target

notes: Staff advisories are derived from frontline pressure, defender count, reserve candidates, lead enemy phase/type, average ammo, average morale, and damaged facility state.
Applying an advisory reuses the frontline doctrine preset path, so it remains a battle-runtime StandingOrder command rather than a separate simulation branch.
